raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 33,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch dehſtija Kohka
Dahrsu Bersabâ/ un prefauze tur
o Wahrdü ta KUNGA/ ta
uhſchiga STIPRA DEE-
BA.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 34,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Ahbräims mitte/ ka
weſchineeks eekſch taus Wiht-
eu Semmes ilgu Laiku.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta XXII. Nodalla.
braäms/ us Deewa Pawehleſchanu gribbe,
dams ſawu Dehlu uppureht: 2/3. Tohp
gaur weenu Engeei no Debbeß aiſkawehts: 11.
Un ta Dsimmuma Wairoſchana/ ir ta Sweh,
a SEHKLA Atjaunaſchana tohp winnam
ukkal eeſohſita: 15. Naßra Raddi/ kas arri
fembina Betuëlu Rebekkas Tehwu: 20/21.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "N tas notifkahs pehz
fchahm Leetahm/pabau-
dija Deews Ahbräimu/
fazzija us to : Ahbräims!
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas atbildeja : Reds/
es efmu/ un wiꞥſch fazzija:
mm jelle tarut Dehlu / tarut
nigu/ ko tu mihle/ to Ihsää-
un eij us to Seinunt Mortija/
ippure to tur/par weenu Ded-
u-Uppuri/ us weenu no teem
neein/ ko es teiw fazzischu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Ahbräims zehlahs rib-
gri/ un apjohſe ſawu Ehseli/
rehme diwt no ſaweeim Pui-
in ar ſew/ un Ihsääku ſawu
in/ un ſkardija Malku / par
edsamu-Uppuri/un zehlahs/
ahje us to Weetu/ ko Deews
bij fazzijis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Trefchâ Deenâ/ kad Ahbra-
äms ſawas Azzis pazehſe/tad re-
dſeja wiꞥſch to Weetu no tahſenes.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Ahbräims fazzija us
ſaweeim Puifscheem : Paleezeet
juhs tejn ar to Ehseli/ un es/ un
tas Puifis/ eetim us turren/ un
peeſuhgſim/ tad ateefim mehs at-
kak pee jums.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad nehme Ahbräims ta
Dedsama-Uppura Malku/ un liſ-
ke to us Ihsääku ſawu Dehlu/ un
nehme ſawâ Rohkâ to Ugguni/
un to Nasi / un tee gabje abbee
kohpâ.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad runnaja Ihsääks/ ar
Ahbräimu ſawu Tehwu/ un faz-
zija : Mans Tehws/ un wiꞥſch
fazzija : Reds/ fche es efmu /
mans Dehls/ un tas fazzija/
Reds/ ſche ta Ugguns / un ta
Malka/ bet kur irr tas Jehrs par
Dedsamu-Uppuri?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad fazzija Ahbräims:
Deews ſew iſredſehs weenu Teh-
ru/ par Dedsamu-Uppuri/ mans
Dehls/ un tee gabje abbee kohpâ.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un nahje us to Weetu/ ko
Deews winnam bij fazzijis/ un Jeb
Ahbräims uſtaifija tur weenu
Altari/ un falikſe to Malku/ un
faistija to Ihsääku ſawu Dehlu/
un liſke to wiꞥſ to Altari / pa
Malkawirfu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Ahbräims iſſteepe fa-
wu Rohku/ un nehme to Nasi/
ſawu Dehlu nokaut.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet ta KUNGA Enge-
lis ſanze no Debbeß us to/ un faz-
zija: Ahbräims ! Ahbräims! Un
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
